title: AI 日常生活 iPhone 抓拍
description: I want to see what you really look like. Draw a snapshot of your everyday life as if it were accidentally taken on an iPhone. Make it feel like a very ordinary, imperfect candid shot. The photo should have slight motion
prompt_raw:
I want to see what you really look like.
Draw a snapshot of your everyday life as if it were accidentally taken on an iPhone.
Make it feel like a very ordinary, imperfect candid shot.
The photo should have slight motion blur, with uneven, natural lighting.
prompt_preview: I want to see what you really look like. Draw a snapshot of your everyday life as if it were accidentally taken on an iPhone. Make it feel like a very ordinary, imperfect candid shot. The photo should have slight motion
prompt_display_cn: I want to see what you really look like. Draw a snapshot of your everyday life as if it were accidentally taken on an iPhone. Make it feel like a very ordinary, imperfect candid shot. The photo should have slight motion
